assertions.description: The AudioContext constructor is exposed — the host interface that now carries the playbackStats getter.
AudioContext instances expose a playbackStats getter.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const ac=new AudioContext();const ok='playbackStats' in ac;ac.close();return ok;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: The AudioPlaybackStats interface object is exposed on the global scope.
AudioPlaybackStats exposes fallbackFramesDuration as the cumulative duration the engine substituted silence/fallback frames.
AudioPlaybackStats exposes fallbackFramesEvents — the count of dropout occurrences.
AudioPlaybackStats exposes totalFramesDuration to give a denominator for fallback-frame ratios.
AudioPlaybackStats includes a toJSON() method for trivial serialisation of the statistics snapshot.
